'''Kooloota-Fyf''' was the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] [[Guild Master/Legends|leader]] of the [[Shipbuilders and Astromechs Guild]] and one of the funders of [[Carnor Jax]]'s plan to sabotage [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]]. He served on the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The .22Council of Blood.22|Imperial Interim Ruling Council]]. His position on the Council ensured the cooperation of the Guild, and little else. He was imprisoned by [[Xandel Carivus]] during Carivus' bid for power.

Following Carivus' death, he was taken into [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] custody.

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]] {{1st}}
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]]
